summary: Comprehensive testing of K9 Command Kennel Operations Platform - All P0 bug fixes and Admin CRUD features verified. Backend: 25/25 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All requested features working correctly.

resolved_during_testing.issue: DogIcon was not imported from lucide-react, causing page crash

P0_bug_fix.booking_review_page: VERIFIED - After selecting dogs, dates, and location on step 1, clicking 'Check Availability & Continue' now correctly navigates to step 2 showing availability status and pricing summary

admin_bookings_crud.status_dropdown: VERIFIED - Status dropdown on each booking card
admin_bookings_crud.edit_button: VERIFIED - Edit button on each booking card
admin_bookings_crud.delete_button: VERIFIED - Delete button on each booking card
admin_bookings_crud.status_filters: VERIFIED - All, Pending, Confirmed, Checked_in, Checked_out, Cancelled filters

admin_staff_tasks_crud.complete_button: VERIFIED - Complete button on pending tasks
admin_staff_tasks_crud.edit_button: VERIFIED - Edit button on each task
admin_staff_tasks_crud.delete_button: VERIFIED - Delete button on each task

admin_customers.customer_list: VERIFIED - Lists all customers with their dogs
admin_customers.activate_deactivate_toggle: VERIFIED - Activate/Deactivate button on each customer
admin_customers.search_functionality: VERIFIED - Search by name or email

backend_api_tests: Admin user management (get users, toggle status)

seed_data_creation: Created Main Kennel location for testing (required for booking and task tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 bug fixes verified. Admin CRUD pages (Bookings, Staff/Tasks, Customers) are fully functional with proper buttons and controls. Backend API tests are comprehensive and can be reused. Location 'Main Kennel' was created for testing purposes.

mocked_integrations.Square_payments: MOCKED - Uses mock payment ID, no real payment processing
mocked_integrations.File_storage: MOCKED - Uses base64 encoding instead of cloud storage
